/usr/bin/c++ --coverage -g -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic --coverage --coverage  --coverage --coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/banking_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/banking_tests.dir/tests/test_account.cpp.o CMakeFiles/banking_tests.dir/tests/test_transaction.cpp.o -o banking_tests  libbanking.a third-party/gtest/googlemock/gtest/libgtest_maind.a third-party/gtest/googlemock/libgmockd.a third-party/gtest/googlemock/gtest/libgtestd.a
